sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-06-26 18:33
- Distance: 3.4 km
- Moving time: 30:30
- Elapsed time: 32:26
- Elevation gain: 23.6 m
- Average heart rate: 132.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 152 bpm
- Average watts: 136.1 W
- Average speed: 6.7 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `136.6 bpm`, ranging from `125.7` to `152.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `127.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `146.1 bpm` (+19.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `139.5 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `166.6 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `132.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `141.0 spm` (+8.9 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `9:00 /km` across `3.390 km` in `30:30` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `10:29 /km` and second-half pace was `7:31 /km` (-178 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `132.3 bpm` average and `152 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `128.1 bpm` in the first half and `136.4 bpm` in the second (+8.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `30:30` out of `32:26` elapsed (94.0%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `43` stop segments and `25.4%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `40.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `16.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `20.2 m` in the first half and `20.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
